reasoning: Order notes include a PATTERN ALERT indicating a significant recent change in customer behavior (8 refund requests out of last 9 orders) and prior escalation guidance for fraud review. Although the customer claims a wrong item was shipped, there is no shipment discrepancy evidence provided, and historical data shows repeated refund claims with delivered tracking. Additionally, the order shows no payment captured (Check/Money Order), which requires verification. Escalating to fraud/review team is appropriate before approving any refund, to request proof (photos of received items, packing slip) and validate fulfillment and payment status.
